faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in North Merrick typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout North Merrick. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can typically arrive at your property within a few hours of your call during peak season.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than wasps and yellow jackets, typically building large paper nests in trees or under eaves. They are more aggressive when defending their nests and their stings are more painful. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all stinging insect nests common to North Merrick.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?

We'll advise you on any temporary precautions needed during treatment and ensure the area is completely safe before finishing.
